long.description: Use long listing format showing permissions, owner, size, and modification time

all.description: Include directory entries whose names begin with a dot

human_readable.description: Print file sizes in human-readable format (e.g. 1K, 234M, 2G)

sort_by_size.description: Sort by file size, largest first

sort_by_time.description: Sort by modification time, newest first

color.description: Colorize output based on file type and attributes (auto/always/never)

group_directories_first.description: List directories before files in the output
